declarations.description:
A feedback component for communicating status messages, warnings, and errors.
Critical for healthcare patient safety alerts.
declarations.name: HelixAlert

cssParts.description: The dismiss button (only rendered when closable).
cssParts.name: close-button

slots.description: Default slot for alert message content.
Custom icon to override the default variant icon.
slots.name: icon

slots.description: Action buttons rendered within the alert.
slots.name: actions

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual variant of the alert that determines colors and ARIA semantics.

members.name: closable
members.description: Whether the alert can be dismissed by the user.

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the alert is visible. Set to false to hide the alert.

members.name: _isAssertive
members.description: Returns true when the variant requires assertive announcement.

members.name: _role
members.description: Returns the appropriate ARIA role based on variant.

members.name: _ariaLive
members.description: Returns the appropriate aria-live value based on variant.

events.name: hx-close
events.description: Dispatched when the user dismisses the alert.

events.name: wc-after-close
events.description: Dispatched after the alert is dismissed.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual variant of the alert that determines colors and ARIA semantics.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Whether the alert can be dismissed by the user.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the alert is visible. Set to false to hide the alert.

declarations.summary: Feedback alert for status messages with variant-based styling and ARIA live regions.

declarations.description: A small status indicator for notifications, counts, and labels.

cssProperties.name: --hx-badge-padding-y

cssProperties.description: Pulse color matching variant background with reduced opacity.

cssProperties.description: Dot indicator size when rendered without content.

slots.description: Default slot for badge content (text, number). When empty with pulse enabled, renders as a dot indicator.

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual style variant of the badge.

members.name: size
members.description: Size of the badge.

members.name: pill
members.description: Whether the badge uses fully rounded (pill) styling.

members.name: pulse
members.description: Whether the badge displays an animated pulse for attention.

members.name: _hasSlotContent
members.description: Tracks whether the default slot has assigned content.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style variant of the badge.

attributes.name: hx-size
attributes.description: Size of the badge.

attributes.name: pill
attributes.description: Whether the badge uses fully rounded (pill) styling.

attributes.name: pulse
attributes.description: Whether the badge displays an animated pulse for attention.

declarations.summary: Presentational badge for status indicators, notification counts, and labels.

declarations.description: A flexible card component for displaying grouped content.

slots.description: The card heading/title content.
slots.name: heading

slots.description: Default slot for the card body content.
Optional footer content below the body.
slots.name: footer

slots.description: Optional action buttons, rendered with a top border separator.
slots.name: actions

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual style variant of the card.

members.name: elevation
members.description: Elevation (shadow depth) of the card.

members.name: wcHref
members.description:
Optional URL. When set, the card becomes interactive (clickable)
and navigates to this URL on click.
Uses wc-href to avoid conflicting with the native HTML href attribute.

members.name: _hasSlotContent
members.default: { image: false, heading: false, footer: false, actions: false, }

events.name: wc-card-click
events.description: Dispatched when an interactive card (with wc-href) is clicked.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style variant of the card.

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Elevation (shadow depth) of the card.

attributes.name: hx-href
attributes.description:
Optional URL. When set, the card becomes interactive (clickable)
and navigates to this URL on click.
Uses wc-href to avoid conflicting with the native HTML href attribute.

declarations.summary: Content container with image, heading, body, footer, and action slots.

declarations.description:
A layout container that constrains content width and provides
consistent vertical spacing and horizontal gutters.

Uses a two-layer model: the outer host spans full width (background,
vertical padding), while the inner wrapper constrains max-width,
centers content, and applies horizontal gutters.
declarations.name: HelixContainer

cssProperties.description: Background color on the outer wrapper.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-bg

cssProperties.description: Horizontal padding on the inner box.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-gutter

cssProperties.description: Override the max-width set by the width property.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-max-width

cssProperties.description: Max-width for the content width preset.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-content

cssProperties.description: Max-width for the sm width preset.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-sm

cssProperties.description: Max-width for the md width preset.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-md

cssProperties.description: Max-width for the lg width preset.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-lg

cssProperties.description: Max-width for the xl width preset.
cssProperties.name: --hx-container-xl

cssParts.description: The inner wrapper that constrains max-width and applies gutters.
cssParts.name: inner

slots.description: Default slot for container content.

members.name: width
members.description: Controls the max-width of the inner content wrapper.

members.name: padding
members.description: Vertical padding applied to the outer wrapper.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Controls the max-width of the inner content wrapper.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Vertical padding applied to the outer wrapper.

declarations.summary: Layout primitive for constraining content width with consistent spacing.

declarations.description:
A Light DOM form wrapper that styles native HTML form elements and
wc-* components with the design system's form styles.

When `action` is set, renders a `<form>` wrapper around slotted content.
When no `action` is set (the Drupal pattern), renders only a `<slot>`
so Drupal can provide its own `<form>` tag.

Uses adopted stylesheets to inject scoped CSS into the document without
Shadow DOM, keeping native form participation and Drupal compatibility.
declarations.name: HelixForm

slots.description: Default slot for form fields and controls.

members.name: action
members.description:
The URL to submit the form to. When empty, the form handles
submission client-side only and dispatches `wc-submit`.

members.name: method
members.description: The HTTP method used when submitting the form.

members.name: novalidate
members.description:
When true, disables the browser's built-in constraint validation
on form submission.

members.name: name
members.description: Identifies the form for scripting and form discovery.

members.name: checkValidity
members.description:
Checks the validity of all child form elements without showing
validation UI. Returns `true` if all elements are valid.

members.name: reportValidity
members.description:
Checks validity and triggers the browser's constraint validation UI
on each invalid element. Returns `true` if all elements are valid.

members.name: getFormData
members.description:
Collects form data from all child form elements (native and wc-*).
Returns a `FormData` object.

members.name: getFormElements
members.description:
Returns all child wc-* form components (elements whose tag starts
with `wc-` and that have a `name` property or a `value` property).

members.name: getNativeFormElements
members.description:
Returns all native form elements (input, select, textarea, button)
found within this component's light DOM.

members.name: _getAllValidatableElements
members.description:
Returns all elements that support constraint validation, including
both native form elements and wc-* components with `checkValidity`.

events.description: Dispatched on valid client-side submit when no action is set.
events.name: wc-submit

events.description: Dispatched when validation fails on submit.
events.name: wc-invalid

events.description: Dispatched when the form is reset.
events.name: wc-reset

attributes.name: action
attributes.description:
The URL to submit the form to. When empty, the form handles
submission client-side only and dispatches `wc-submit`.

attributes.name: method
attributes.description: The HTTP method used when submitting the form.

attributes.name: novalidate
attributes.description:
When true, disables the browser's built-in constraint validation
on form submission.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Identifies the form for scripting and form discovery.

declarations.summary: Light DOM form wrapper with scoped styles for native and wc-* form elements.

declarations.description:
A Light DOM prose container that applies typographic styles to rich text
content such as CKEditor output, Markdown-rendered HTML, or any structured
body copy.

Renders in the Light DOM (no Shadow DOM) so that global and scoped styles
can target child elements directly. Uses the AdoptedStylesheetsController
to inject scoped prose CSS into the document without duplication.
declarations.name: HelixProse

slots.description: Default slot for rich text content (headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, etc.).

members.name: size
members.description: Typography scale for the prose content.

members.name: maxWidth
members.description:
Maximum content width. When set, overrides the --hx-prose-max-width token.
Accepts any valid CSS width value (e.g., '640px', '80ch', '100%').

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Typography scale for the prose content.

attributes.name: max-width
attributes.description:
Maximum content width. When set, overrides the --hx-prose-max-width token.
Accepts any valid CSS width value (e.g., '640px', '80ch', '100%').

declarations.summary: Light DOM typography wrapper for rich text and CMS content.

declarations.description:
A select component that wraps a native `<select>` element with the
library's form field pattern (label, error, help text).

Options are provided via slotted `<option>` elements in the light DOM.
The component observes slotted options via `slotchange` and clones them
into the shadow DOM `<select>` for rendering.
declarations.name: HelixSelect

cssParts.description: The wrapper around the select (for custom chevron).
cssParts.name: select-wrapper

slots.description: Default slot for `<option>` elements. These are cloned into the native select.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the textarea is disabled.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Error message to display. When set, the textarea enters an error state.

attributes.name: help-text
attributes.description: Help text displayed below the textarea for guidance.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the textarea, used for form submission.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: The number of visible text rows.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: Maximum number of characters allowed.

attributes.name: resize
attributes.description: Controls how the textarea can be resized. Use 'auto' for auto-grow behavior.

attributes.name: show-count
attributes.description: Whether to show a character count below the textarea.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Accessible name for screen readers, if different from the visible label.

declarations.summary: Form-associated textarea with built-in label, error, help text, character counter, and auto-resize.
